calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Frisco ISD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Frisco ISD is Wednesday, August 12, 2026. September 8 is an additional student holiday immediately following Labor Day, creating a four-consecutive-day break at the very start of the school year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Frisco ISD in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Frisco ISD is Friday, May 14, 2027 — eight days earlier than the 2025–2026 end date of May 22, the earliest end date in recent Frisco ISD history.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2026-2027 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Frisco ISD runs March 15–19, 2027 — a full week off. This aligns with Plano ISD that same week, making it one of the busiest travel windows across the northern DFW suburbs.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Frisco ISD runs December 21, 2026–January 1, 2027 (12 days). A student holiday falls on January 4, so students return Tuesday, January 5, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Thanksgiving break 2026-2027 for Frisco ISD?
calendarFaqs.a: Thanksgiving break for Frisco ISD runs November 23–27, 2026 (Monday through Friday). Thanksgiving Day falls on November 26. School resumes Monday, November 30, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Ends Earlier
yearNumbers.detail: Last day moves from May 22 to May 14 vs 2025–2026 — the earliest end date in recent Frisco ISD history.

yearNumbers.label: Labor Day Extended
yearNumbers.detail: Sep 8 is a student holiday immediately following Labor Day, creating a four-consecutive-day break at the start of the school year.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break Later
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break shifts one week later from Mar 9–13 in 2025–2026, aligning Frisco ISD with Plano ISD that week.

calendarNotes: The 2026–2027 school year runs from August 12, 2026, through May 14, 2027. Spring Break falls March 15–19 and aligns with Plano ISD, making it one of the busiest travel weeks across the northern DFW suburbs. Three bad weather make-up days are pre-scheduled on the calendar — March 26, April 16, and April 30 — each a regular school day unless winter weather closures earlier in the year require them for makeup. September 8 is a student holiday immediately following Labor Day, extending that weekend to four consecutive days off.
